title: LESSON 1 — kill chain framework
subtitle: A repeatable lesson chrome: stepper, narrator card, page header, then a phase-specific content panel. Same skeleton on every lesson.

regions.label: STEPPER · 7 DOTS
regions.note: Active dot fills with accent + glow. Passed dots filled solid; future dim. Connector = sequence.

regions.label: NARRATOR
regions.note: Reused across home / lessons / quiz so the avatar feels like a constant companion.

regions.label: PAGE HEADER
regions.note: Tracked eyebrow tells WHERE you are in the curriculum; huge title says WHAT this lesson is about.

regions.label: PHASE CHAIN
regions.note: Sequential row replicates the kill chain itself. Each node is clickable; connectors enforce read order.
